goal: One of the goals that i have is that i would like to add the ability to look at all of the different audio files that i have and then skim through them somehow and make sure that i get rid of all the ones that i don't actually need

I would like to see the ability to go through my code and look at test coverage and check out a repository and see if there's good test coverage for the repository
To be able to go through a repository and check the branches and see if there are any unfinished projects waiting in the wings that we can go through and get rid of or finish up
The idea is that sometimes our branches and our get environment can get untidy and i want to get that addressed
